subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-10-13 in San Francisco
subcodes.first_line: This afternoon we drove out to the sea-shore. We looked upon the beautiful sea with its high waves, and pondered over the time when the Sea of Love will be set in motion.
subcodes.subjects: @music and singing, @oneness; unity of religion, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @universal peace; world unity, @independent investigation of truth; reality
